atoms.semantic_claim: Block assembly uses per-block context extra_data when provided and falls back to the assembler default extra_data otherwise, so dynamic CL extra_data can reach the final block header without breaking the default path.

destinations.evidence: The destination block assembler writes context extra_data directly into the header. The fallback is structurally shifted to the context construction path because the destination context carries Bytes rather than Option<Bytes>.
The destination EVM config passes NextBlockEnvAttributes.extra_data into the execution context consumed by the assembler.

atoms.equivalence_argument: The source Option fallback moved upstream; after file-0076 closure, the normal payload path resolves CL/default extra_data before EthBlockExecutionCtx reaches the assembler.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Assemble one block with CL-supplied dynamic extra_data and one with no CL extra_data/default config, then assert the header extra_data equals the requested dynamic bytes and the configured default respectively.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: confirmed covered. build.rs writes ctx.extra_data into Header.extra_data, and lib.rs populates ctx.extra_data from both existing block headers and NextBlockEnvAttributes.

atoms.source_snippet: if extra_data.len() > MAXIMUM_EXTRA_DATA_SIZE { debug!(extra_data_len = extra_data.len(), block_number = evm_env.block_env.number, is_dynamic = ctx.extra_data.is_some(), "building block with large extra_data"); }
atoms.semantic_claim: Block assembly emits a tracing debug diagnostic when dynamic or default extra_data exceeds the Ethereum maximum, including length, block number, and whether the value was dynamic.

destinations.evidence: The destination assembler has no MAXIMUM_EXTRA_DATA_SIZE import, tracing import, or large-extra_data debug diagnostic.
The destination crate manifest also lacks the tracing dependency needed by this diagnostic.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Assemble a block with extra_data longer than MAXIMUM_EXTRA_DATA_SIZE and assert the debug diagnostic includes extra_data_len, block_number, and dynamic/default provenance.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: confirmed missing telemetry only. The oversized-extra_data debug event and MAXIMUM_EXTRA_DATA_SIZE import are absent.

adversarial_reviews.reason: Mechanical review completed; remaining non-exact atoms are now confirmed covered, confirmed missing, intentionally absent, or support/test/telemetry only.

summary: Mechanical review complete. Header extra_data propagation is confirmed covered through NextBlockEnvAttributes -> EthBlockExecutionCtx -> Header.extra_data; only the oversized-extra_data debug diagnostic remains confirmed missing.
notes: Queue entry 78 was verified as M\tcrates/ethereum/evm/src/build.rs; only diff lines 16072-16121 were analyzed for this record. Mechanical review review-files-0077-0089-mechanical completed; all prior needs-review atoms have definitive verdicts.
